description: Style NoteSpun from our irresistibly soft cotton, this blissfully cosy T-shirt follows our favourite trend - graphic tees! Sporting a che guevara print on the chest, this tee gives a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer uniform. Style it with checked shorts, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalance.Product DetailsGreen round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separatelyDo not bleach, do not dry clean, do not tumble dryWarm iron, iron print on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6” and shoulder 18”) is wearing a size M
